zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Sneyde於1508年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利時，她的父親Richard Sneyd22歲，母親Lady Anne Fouleshurst21歲。她於1520年與Henry Gee在英國英格蘭爾切斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1574年10月31日在英國越可爾卡爾福利享年66歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克霍利 特利尼迪 金也斯 斯華雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Sneyde于1508年出生在英国英格兰越可爾卡爾福利时，她的父亲Richard Sneyd22岁，母亲Lady Anne Fouleshurst21岁。她于1520年与Henry Gee在英国英格兰爾切斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1574年10月31日在英国越可爾卡爾福利享年66岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克霍利 特利尼迪 金也斯 斯華雷。

nameMeanings.name: Sneyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sneyd in Burslem (Staffordshire), The Sneyd near Bloxwich (also Staffordshire), or Snead Farm and Snead Common in Rock (Worcestershire), all of which derived from Middle English snede, Old English snǣd ‘detached piece of land or woodland’. Compare Snaith .

variants.name: Snaith
meanings: English: habitational name from Snaith in Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old Norse sneith ‘slice of land, piece of land cut off’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Sneyde was born in 1508, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Sneyd, was 22 and her mother, Lady Anne Fouleshurst, was 21. She married Henry Gee in 1520, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 31 October 1574, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorkshire, England.

Elle a épousé Henry Gee en 1520, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 octobre 1574, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sneydeが1508年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Richard Sneydは22歳，母Lady Anne Fouleshurstは21歳であった。1520年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターでHenry Geeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1574年10月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで66歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークホーリー トリニトイ キング'ス スクアアにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorksh: 영국 요르크실르 요르크 홀이 트리니티 킨그'스 스퀄르
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sneyde(이)가 1508년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Sneyd(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Fouleshurst(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 Henry Gee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 10월 31일 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크 홀이 트리니티 킨그'스 스퀄르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Sneyde nasceu em 1508, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Sneyd, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Fouleshurst, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Gee em 1520, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1574, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorksh: холи тринити кинг'с скуар, ерк, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Sneyde родилась в 1508 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Sneyd было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Fouleshurst, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Gee в 1520 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 31 октября 1574 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности холи тринити кинг'с скуар, ерк, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Henry Gee en 1520, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1574, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
